content.question: What is the independent causal contribution of Hungary's 6/8-year track structure alone to the country's EU-highest level of school-based segregation, net of residential segregation, free school choice policies, and admissions autonomy?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a comparative structural decomposition analysis isolating the track feature from other policy mechanisms; use regression discontinuity or synthetic control designs comparing Hungarian cohorts subject to track selection at different ages; complement with qualitative case studies of schools operating under the same admissions rules but without early selection pathways (if they exist within Hungary's system).
